layers.name: sharpedge_intent_layer
layers.role: Defines domain goals and upstream intent.
not_allowed_to_decide: exact Android execution route inside this checkout

layers.name: code_puppy_runtime
layers.role: Agent runtime, tool execution, plugin loading.
allowed_to_decide: how agents are assembled and invoked
how plugins attach tools and callbacks

layers.name: droidpuppy_overlay
layers.role: Android-native orchestration and device capability exposure.
not_allowed_to_decide: whether the domain objective is justified

layers.name: project_os_supervisor
layers.role: Manifest-driven local service orchestration and operator snapshots.
allowed_to_decide: how local services are started, observed, and tailed

layers.name: authority_gateway
layers.role: Execution containment, lease enforcement, breaker/quarantine controls.
allowed_to_decide: whether a tracked effectful action is currently permitted
not_allowed_to_decide: whether a business objective is good

layers.name: puppy_kennel
allowed_to_decide: what durable context is stored and recalled

layers.name: broker_delegation_seam
layers.role: Packages downstream broker tasks for approved operator flows.
allowed_to_decide: how a broker request is packaged for downstream handling

imported_operator_doctrine.source: SharpEdge operator layer doctrine referenced by repo skills/docs
